# Astray Verify v0.2.0

Astray Verify now goes beyond a single `tools/list` snapshot: every MCP
discovery surface is configurable, every contract change is explained,
and the weakest protocol risk is named with a concrete fix.

## What's new

- **Per-fixture check selection.** Snapshot `tools`, `resources`, and
  `prompts` independently with `--checks tools,resources,prompts` and a
  per-fixture timeout.
- **Deep MCP audit.** `astray-verify audit` ranks protocol and contract
  weaknesses, names the single highest-risk area, and suggests a
  concrete repair action.
- **Doctor and watch.** `doctor` gives a one-shot health check (config,
  fixtures, log, optional test pass). `watch` re-runs the test suite
  whenever a fixture or `astray.verify.json` changes.
- **JSON-first automation.** Every command supports `--json` for a
  structured report and `--log` for an append-only JSON Lines execution
  log.
- **Crate metadata.** Authors, repository, keywords, and categories are
  filled in for crates.io discoverability.

## Install

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheAstrayDev/astray-verify/main/install.sh | sh
```

or

```bash
cargo install astray-verify --version 0.2.0
```

## Quick start

```bash
astray-verify init
astray-verify record --name complete \
  --checks tools,resources,prompts --timeout-ms 45000 \
  -- npx your-mcp-server
astray-verify test
astray-verify audit --name complete
astray-verify doctor
```
